prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年第67名（2021年第61→2022年第54→2023年第56→2024年第54→2025年第59→2026年 第67），近年排名略有下滑但仍属全国百强；2023年声誉评价中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理回应，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第68位，评价"一般"，综 合热度约44.5万，短视频曝光量处于211高校中游水平，未见明显报考关注升温信号；安全科学与工程A+（全国顶尖）、测绘科学与技术A-、土木工程A-；该校 安全工程、测绘等王牌专业与招生计划中的安全科学与工程类、遥感科学与技术等直接对应，对相关方向考生有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化 、电子信息/通信等专业2024–2026年均维持"高热推荐"或"推荐"热度，矿大物理类开设的计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、人工智能等专业契合当前热门方向；广东省2026年物理 类考生约45.6万人，较2025年44.0万人增加约3.6%，竞争加剧，2025年物理类本科批436分，近年波动不大；中国矿业大学位于江苏徐州，在 广东省招生占比约3%（2025年），属跨省招生；广东考生对省外211高校的报考意愿受地域偏好影响，矿大非热门沿海城市，地域吸引力中等。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年 连续两年位次大幅后移趋势、2026年招生计划微缩0.8%、广东省物理类考生增加3.6%以及学校排名略有下滑等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年37557名基础上继续小幅 后移（竞争略加剧）。预测最低位次约37568名，区间37068–38068名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 29441 → 29634 → 26943 → 36276 → 37557. After rebounding to 26943 in 2023, it dropped significantly for two consecutive years, with a cumulative decline of about 10,600 places in the last two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 37557, the highest in the past five years (easiest to enter). The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 115, 109, 108, 110, and 119 students respectively, increasing to 119 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 118 students, a slight decrease of 1 student from 2025, a reduction of about 0.8%, which has minimal impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 67th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (61st in 2021 → 54th in 2022 → 56th in 2023 → 54th in 2024 → 59th in 2025 → 67th in 2026), with a slight decline in recent years but still among the top 100 nationally. The 2023 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving university management responses, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 68th overall, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 445,000. Short video exposure is at the mid-level among 211 universities, with no obvious signal of increased application attention. Safety Science and Engineering A+ (top in the country), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-. These top-tier majors, such as safety engineering and surveying, directly correspond to the Safety Science and Engineering Class and Remote Sensing Science and Technology in the enrollment plan, attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication maintained 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' popularity from 2024 to 2026. The Physics Category at CUMT offers Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Artificial Intelligence, and other majors that align with current hot directions. In 2026, there are approximately 456,000 Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. The 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 436 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. CUMT is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, and its enrollment proportion in Guangdong is about 3% (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Guangdong candidates' willingness to apply to out-of-province 211 universities is influenced by regional preferences. CUMT is not in a popular coastal city, so its regional appeal is moderate.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant downward trend in rankings for two consecutive years from 2024 to 2025, the slight reduction of 0.8% in the 2026 enrollment plan, the 3.6% increase in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong, and the slight decline in university ranking, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to decline slightly from the 2025 baseline of 37557 (competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 37568, with a range of 37068 to 38068.

Tier 1 majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence) can be used as reach options, while Tier 3 majors (Chemical Engineering, Business Administration, Civil Engineering) serve as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 37068), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated narrowly between 7400 and 8200, specifically 7440 → 7701 → 7611 → 7418 → 8181. In 2025, the ranking was 8181, the highest (easiest to enter) in the past five years, an increase of approximately 763 places compared to 2024.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial enrollment plan for History Category from 2021 to 2025 was 26, 30, 28, 32, and 20 students respectively, with a significant reduction to 20 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 23 students, an increase of 3 students (+15%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and will push the ranking number higher (increased competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 67th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, among the top 100 nationally, still strongly attractive to liberal arts candidates. In 2023, reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed. Douyin popularity is average, with no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal application attention signals. Safety Science and Engineering (A+), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology (A-), and Civil Engineering (A-) are all strong STEM disciplines, with limited direct appeal to History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law maintained a 'recommended' popularity from 2024 to 2026, Chinese Language and Literature 'recommended', and Teacher Training/Education 'differentiated wait-and-see'. CUMT offers Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Business Administration, Public Administration, etc., with Law and Chinese Language and Literature being popular liberal arts directions. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Guangdong Province is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% from 292,200 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 464 points, showing an upward trend in recent years. CUMT is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, not a first-tier city, with moderate regional appeal to Guangdong liberal arts candidates, but the 211 level still offers a safety net value.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three factors of the 2025 ranking already at a five-year high, the 15% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the 11.6% increase in History Category candidates in Guangdong Province, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward (increased competition) from the 2025 ranking of 8181. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8967, with a range of 8467–9467.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 8467), you can focus on aiming for Law.
